raw.objective: “to evaluate the steady-state pharmacokinetics of VPA in patients with bipolar disorder receiving prophylactic therapy and to ascertain the therapeutic serum levels of VPA.”
raw.observations: A positive correlation found between dose and steady state serum levels. The data shows that the PK is a two-compartment open model. The study raises possibility that bipolar disorder patients eliminate VPA at a slower rate than epileptic patients. A limitation is the small subject group.
raw.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
raw.structure: Two-compartment model with first-order absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL = (theta1*WT)*(60/1000)*exp(eta1))) #mL/min converted to L/h by 60/1000 V = (theta2*WT)*exp(eta2))) KA = theta3*exp(eta3) WT: Total body weight (kg) Cobs=Cipred #no error model reported

structural_model.description: Two-compartment model with first-order absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL = (theta1*WT)*(60/1000)*exp(eta1))) #mL/min converted to L/h by 60/1000 V = (theta2*WT)*exp(eta2))) KA = theta3*exp(eta3) WT: Total body weight (kg) Cobs=Cipred #no error model reported
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
study.objective: “to evaluate the steady-state pharmacokinetics of VPA in patients with bipolar disorder receiving prophylactic therapy and to ascertain the therapeutic serum levels of VPA.”

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
